servinfo.title: Front Side-Impact Sensor Removal and Installation (8 or 9-Channel Air Bag System)

item.ptxt: Never drop, strike or shake sensor.
If dropped, replace it even if there is no defect in appearance.
If sensor is deformed or cracked, replace.
Sensor bolt must be carefully torqued to assure proper operation.
Loosely connected sensor may cause improper operation of air bag system.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect front side-impact sensor connector (2) as follows.

s2.ptxt: Release locking slider (1) by sliding it in direction of arrow “1”.
Disconnect front side-impact sensor connector (2) by pulling it in direction of arrow “2”.

s1.ptxt: Remove front side impact sensor bolt (3) and remove front side-impact sensor (4) from side sill inner panel (5).

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Front Side-Impact Sensor Inspection (8 or 9-Channel Air Bag System)

s1.ptxt: Check that none of the following faulty conditions exists.

item.ptxt: Bend, deformation or rust on side sill scuff.

s1.ptxt: Align mounting pin (1) with mounting hole (2) of vehicle to install front side-impact sensor (3).
Tighten front side-impact sensor bolt to specified torque.
Connect front side-impact sensor connector securely.
